Two men in an SUV allegedly chased his car, smashed its windows at a traffic signal, and attempted to assault him following a dispute over overtaking. Police swiftly arrested two 22-year-old BBA graduates, Parth and Paras, who admitted to the attack after the victim refused to yield. Their Scorpio vehicle has been recovered.

It's a day to recognize their practical love, sacrifices, and the steady presence that shapes lives.  Beyond traditional celebrations, the occasion encourages expressing gratitude for guidance, resilience, and love in all its forms, ensuring these often-unheard heroes feel truly appreciated.

The complainant’s health and collaboration with the inquiry are being closely monitored amidst this sensitive case.

This safe passage follows a US decision to lift its blockade on Iran, allowing resumed movement through the vital waterway. The government assures continued efforts to protect India's maritime and energy interests, with the vessels expected to reach Indian ports next week.

description: A new Standard Operating Procedure has been launched for sea turtle conservation in Lakshadweep, offering a unified framework for management and monitoring. This initiative aims to protect all four major sea turtle species, which are legally protected. The SOP addresses nesting site security, migration tracking, and rescue protocols, building on the success of a decade-long ban on poaching that has boosted green turtle populations in the region.

Despite this growth, trading activity remains heavily concentrated among a small group of large investors across all market segments.

Bill Gates to companies building data centers: Americans won't accept half truth
description: Bill Gates has warned Amazon, Google, Meta and Microsoft that the AI datacentre buildout cannot be sold to Americans on half the truth. Some of these megacomplexes will not pay off, the Microsoft co-founder said, and no community will absorb a higher power bill to underwrite a bad bet. With 48 projects worth $156 billion already blocked in 2025 and US support at just 26 percent, the warning is no longer hypothetical.

Gurbaz appeared to hurt himself while attempting the save but resumed play after treatment. Afghanistan later posted 218, with Hashmatullah Shahidi scoring a century.

The incident, which occurred on Juneteenth, saw victims aged 17 to 47 rushed to hospitals. This violence adds to a disturbing trend, with over 21 people shot and four fatalities reported in the city since Friday evening.

The news follows the massive success of her latest film, 'Maa Inti Bangaaram,' which reportedly recouped its investment on release day. While Samantha and Raj haven't officially announced, a spokesperson has confirmed the pregnancy. Fans have been speculating after spotting what appeared to be a baby bump in recent photos.

Earlier, Afghanistan posted 218, with captain Hashmatullah Shahidi scoring a century, but were undone by Prasidh Krishna's stellar 5-wicket haul.

This development comes as India and the US deepen their strategic partnership, marked by increased defense cooperation and joint exercises aimed at regional stability and countering emerging challenges. High-level visits underscore India's growing alignment with US security frameworks.

title: EU removes negative travel advisory for Assam; Himanta says talks on with US, Canada
description: Assam's Chief Minister announced that the European Union has removed its negative travel advisories for the state, a move that signifies a strong vote of confidence. This development, following a recent EU diplomat visit, excludes three districts still under AFSPA. The state is now engaging with the US and Canada to encourage similar revisions to their travel guidance.

Major dairies are closely monitoring the situation.

description: Indian Army achieved a pivotal victory at Point 5140, the highest point on the Tololing ridgeline, on June 20, 1999. This strategic capture, led by Captain Sanjeev Singh Jamwal and Captain Vikram Batra, crucial for controlling the Dras sector and the Srinagar-Leh National Highway, was announced with distinct success signals. The triumph paved the way for further Indian advances, marking a turning point in the Kargil War.

White House clears rule limiting status of foreign students in US that many have opposed
description: The White House has greenlit a new rule from the Department of Homeland Security that will end the open-ended stay for foreign students, exchange visitors, and media representatives.  Instead, these individuals will now receive a fixed four-year admission period, requiring them to renew their status. This change aims to reduce overstays and enhance national security, though critics warn of administrative burdens.

description: Grow a Garden 2 players can now inject fun and chaos into their gameplay with the affordable Megaphone gear. This item allows users to broadcast any Roblox Sound ID across the server, offering endless entertainment and trolling opportunities.  Acquiring the Megaphone is simple, costing just 8,000 Sheckles.  Discover popular sound IDs like 'Raining Tacos' and 'Tokyo Drift' to liven up your virtual world.

title: Man beaten to death while trying to board train at Delhi's Shahdara railway station
description: A tragic incident unfolded at Shahdara railway station as a 32-year-old man, Pankaj Dhama, was allegedly beaten to death by fellow passengers during a chaotic rush to board the Yoga Express. The altercation, which began on platform number 3, escalated into a fatal assault. Authorities are actively investigating, reviewing CCTV footage and questioning witnesses to identify and apprehend those responsible for the deadly scuffle.

'We don't get to choose..': What Google CEO Sundar Pichai advices to students
description: Google CEO Sundar Pichai, addressing Stanford's Class of 2026, urged graduates to embrace optimism and tackle challenging endeavors. Pichai's core message highlighted the importance of perseverance and continuous forward movement, regardless of life's inevitable uncertainties.

18-year-old drugged, recorded, raped in Gujarat
description: A young woman has accused three individuals of rape and blackmail after allegedly being drugged and filmed unconscious. The main accused, Dipak, is reported to have used the nude video to coerce her into multiple sexual assaults and a forced marriage. He also allegedly threatened her with extreme violence to ensure compliance. Police have arrested one suspect, while Dipak remains at large.
